name: Beet Borscht
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Beet juice, strained from 1 can of beets
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except yogurt in a large bowl.
2. Cover and chill for 2-3 hours.
3. Serve chilled in cocktail glasses or small glass bowls, topping each with 1 tablespoon of yogurt.
Yield: 2 cups (4 servings)
Nutritive values per serving: 6 gm. carbohydrates; 2 gm. protein; 0 gm. fat; 36 calories; 0.6 gm. fiber; 464 mg. sodium; 1 mg. cholesterol
Food Exchange: 1 Vegetable Exchange
Note: This recipe is not suitable for low-sodium diets.
